name: Gladiator Beast Sagittarii
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣闘獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>グラディアルビースト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>サジタリィ
desc: If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Gladiator Beast" monster: You can discard 1 "Gladiator Beast" card; draw 2 cards. At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card battled: You can shuffle this card into the Deck; Special Summon 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster from your Deck, except "Gladiator Beast Sagittarii".
mnst_eff: If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Gladiator Beast" monster: You can discard 1 "Gladiator Beast" card; draw 2 cards. At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card battled: You can shuffle this card into the Deck; Special Summon 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster from your Deck, except "Gladiator Beast Sagittarii".
eff: If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Gladiator Beast" monster: You can discard 1 "Gladiator Beast" card; draw 2 cards. At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card battled: You can shuffle this card into the Deck; Special Summon 1 "Gladiator Beast" monster from your Deck, except "Gladiator Beast Sagittarii".

action: Returns itself from field to Deck for cost
misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
